text: {\fad(0,50)}Let's travel all through the worldwide seas,
If you've made up your mind, let the signal for departure
We were able to escape from the set course
along the boundary between sky and sea.
to a hidden adventure at the dark bottom of the sea.
Doesn't it sound fun just thinking about it?
Let's travel all through the worldwide seas,
If you've made up your mind, let the signal for departure
That feeling we had when we set sail
nothing will be able to scare me...
Now, as the trip approaches, our racing heartbeats
engrave a rhythm of adventure in our shy hearts.
{\fad(0,50)}Give them all out at a big party
Fill your empty heart with dreams.
If you color your heart with the blowing wind
Give them all out at a big party

name: Nami
text: Taking a nice bath while being rocked by the waves...

name: Usopp
text: Put it in! Put it in!

name: Luffy
text: Put it in the fish tank!

name: Sanji
text: The room is fine, but a shark?! Those idiots.

name: Luffy
text: Hey! Did the shark get in?

name: Luffy
text: It's the one with the big horns!

name: Robin
text: All the fish you caught so far are gone.

name: Sanji
text: That was obviously going to happen when you think about the consequences!

name: Luffy
text: {\an8}Sanji! Make BBQ out of this stupid shark!

name: Sanji
text: Maybe some sushi... boiling it adding some spicy vinegar miso...

name: Zoro
text: Hey! Something's floating in the sea.

name: Luffy
text: Some lost stuff from a treasure ship?!

name: Nami
text: It seems to be liquor and food supplies.

name: Luffy
text: How can you tell without looking inside?!

name: Nami
text: It has " Tribute to the Sea-God" written on it, doesn't it?

name: Nami
text: That's a floating barrel someone sends when they pray to have a safe trip.

name: Nami
text: These offerings are sent to receive the sea's divine blessing.

name: Nami
text: In short, the word "tribute" means "to God".

name: Usopp
text: What, so it was pointless picking it up?

name: Zoro
text: After all it's booze, isn't it?

name: Nami
text: You'll be fine as long as you pray, won't you?

name: Zoro
text: I won't pray to some God.

name: Nami
text: It's said that liquor which is cared for by the sea waves has an exceptional taste.

name: Robin
text: After drinking it, we're supposed to refill the barrel with new offerings and set it adrift again.

name: Luffy
text: Hey, God! We'll be receiving this!

name: Zoro
text: Who was the one that beat the hell out of this "God" at the Sky Island...

name: Chopper
text: The liquor flew out, sparkled and then disappeared.

name: Zoro
text: Could it be a curse from the Sea-God?

name: Robin
text: It might have been just a prank, but...

name: Robin
text: Someone might be tracking this ship from now on.

name: Usopp
text: By opening the barrel, we've informed someone that we're here?! {maybe it could be reworded, like "We've informed someone that we're here by opening the barrel?!"}

name: Nami
text: We really can't see anyone one, but...

name: Nami
text: The cloud currents are moving really fast.

name: Nami
text: A great storm is approaching within five minutes!

name: Luffy
text: If she says so, it must be very close! {shouldn't it be "I can't see it," as 1st line and "but if she says so, it must be very close!" as 2nd line?}

name: Franky
text: Do you really think {\i1}this{\i0} is all this boat can handle?

name: Luffy
text: I really like that! It's so cool!

name: Zoro
text: It's not even night, and yet...

name: Zoro
text: This eerie fog has made everything dark.

name: Nami
text: We've ventured into that sea area...

name: Usopp
text: We've already arrived at the Fishman Island?

name: Luffy
text: No, first we need to get through the sea where ghosts come out.

name: Franky
text: Without a doubt... this area is already... the famous... {already?}

name: Franky
text: The outrageous sea where everything mysteriously disappears!

name: Luffy
text: Ghosts come out, right in this sea.

name: Usopp
text: How come everyone besides me knows about that story?!

name: Luffy
text: We heard it from Old Lady Kokoro.

name: Sanji
text: Don't scare him over such absurd stuff.

name: Sanji
text: Every year, more than 100 ships mysteriously vanish within this very sea.

name: Sanji
text: Moreover, it is said that a ghost ship with the souls of deceased people wanders this sea.

name: Usopp
text: Prepared some items to disperse the evil spirits!

name: Chopper
text: Usopp, lend me some of them too!

name: Usopp
text: It's the song of evil spirits!

name: Usopp
text: Close your ears or you'll be cursed!

name: Usopp
text: No matter what kind of thing the ghost says to you, don't listen to him!

name: Usopp
text: If you answer back, he'll drag you to sea with him!

name: Usopp
text: Evil spirits are always hunting travelers!

name: Robin
text: Who could be... riding this ship...?

name: Zoro
text: If he's an enemy, I'll just chop his head off.

name: Nami
text: Why do I have to go?

name: Luffy
text: That's why I told you I'd go by myself.

name: Sanji
text: What if our ship gets cursed because of your stupidity?

name: Luffy
text: Nami, you wanted to find the treasure ship, didn't you?

name: Nami
text: There's no way this is a treasure ship!

name: Luffy
text: He must be the treasure's guardian.

name: Usopp
text: Evil spirits, begone! Evil spirits, begone!

name: Brook
text: {\an8}Forgive my discourtesy, I couldn't greet you when we first met.

name: Brook
text: {\an8}It's been many decades since the last time I met a person.

name: Brook
text: {\an8}Ship after ship, it's the same, just ghost ships wandering around here.

name: Brook
text: {\an8}Well, make yourselves at home and come inside.

name: Brook
text: {\an8}We'll be able to talk more relaxed.

name: Brook
text: I have a good eye for beautiful ladies!

name: Brook
text: Can you please show me your panties?

name: Brook
text: My, my, quite a harsh one!

name: Brook
text: The flesh came right off of my bones...

name: Sanji
text: There are plenty of other questions to ask besides that!

name: Sanji
text: Firstly! Although you're nothing but bones, how can you be alive and talk?!

name: Sanji
text: And what's happening on this sea?!

name: Brook
text: I'm afraid that while traveling, my ship ran into quite a bit of trouble!

name: Brook
text: It's a pleasure to meet you!

name: Brook
text: Would you allow me to see your panties?

name: Usopp
text: Damn it! Skeletons can't talk, or walk, or have afros!

name: Chopper
text: What a relief... just a dream...

name: Luffy
text: He's part of our crew now.

name: Zoro
text: I don't care, I won't let him be!

name: Zoro
text: Why the hell did you guys go with him?

name: Zoro
text: Wasn't it to stop him from doing something like this?!

name: Brook
text: It's nothing to get so worked up about.

name: Brook
text: Oh, what a wonderful dining room!

name: Brook
text: This is such a marvelous ship!

name: Franky
text: Yeah, that's 'cuz this super guy made it!

name: Franky
text: You've really got an eye for quality.

name: Sanji
text: Hey, don't get attached to him, Franky.

name: Brook
text: But what I'm truly looking forward to is the food.

name: Brook
text: I haven't had any good food for so many years...

name: Brook
text: I've lived so long with these hunger pains that I feared I was just skin and bones...

name: Brook
text: Although I'm a skeleton and don't have any skin at all!

name: Brook
text: As a gentleman, I enjoy the time spent awaiting my meal...

name: Brook
text: Chef, please bring me some milk to drink!

name: Brook
text: Oh, I'm sorry, but I'm afraid I don't yet have your name...?

name: Zoro
text: You two didn't even ask that kind of thing?!

name: Sanji
text: We can get rid of the skeleton later.

name: Sanji
text: Right now, it's time to eat!

name: Luffy
text: Hey, Brook, make sure you eat a lot!

name: Brook
text: I'm afraid that my heart is even emptier than my stomach...

name: Brook
text: My fair lady, your portion seems to be a little large.

name: Sanji
text: There's a lot more left, so just eat your own!

name: Franky
text: So you ate a devil fruit....

name: Brook
text: To tell you the truth, I died once years ago.

name: Sanji
text: How'd you get yourself so dirty?

name: Brook
text: Grants the ability to resurrect, so as a "resurrection human"…

name: Brook
text: You have the promise of a second life.

name: Brook
text: Yes, at that time, I was a pirate just like you.

name: Sanji
text: I just wanna beat some manners into you...

name: Brook
text: On the ship I was on before,

name: Brook
text: The crew I was a part of came to this sea of devils.

name: Brook
text: Unluckily for us, incredibly powerful foes appeared.

name: Brook
text: Our whole crew was killed in battle.

name: Brook
text: I, of course, died as well.

name: Brook
text: When I was alive, the Revival Fruit simply made me unable to swim...

name: Brook
text: However, that day the fruit became more than just that!

name: Brook
text: Has returned from the underworld to this world!

name: Brook
text: If I was able to find my body quickly, I would have been revived.

name: Brook
text: However, as you can see, the fog makes this sea difficult to navigate.

name: Brook
text: I searched for my body as a lost soul for an entire year.

name: Brook
text: However, my body had been reduced to nothing but bones!

name: Brook
text: When I saw it, my eyes widened very much in surprise...

name: Luffy
text: You got lost just like Zoro!

name: Franky
text: So that's when you became a talking skeleton?

name: Franky
text: I didn't know a devil fruit could even bring someone back to life...

name: Sanji
text: But even after you come back to life, you're still unable to swim,

name: Zoro
text: But normally hair can't grow on bones...

name: Zoro
text: I've never seen a skeleton with an afro before.

name: Brook
text: Oh, I just had strong roots.

name: Usopp
text: So, that means you aren't a ghost?

name: Brook
text: If I see one, I cry out in fear!

name: Nami
text: Have you ever looked in a mirror?

name: both
text: Why don't you have a reflection in the mirror?!

name: Usopp
text: You don't have a shadow either!

name: Usopp
text: W-We're all really scared here! Because of you!

name: Brook
text: I've been traveling this sea for so many years...

name: Brook
text: However, me being a skeleton and having no shadow are two unrelated matters.

name: Brook
text: My shadow was stolen from me years ago.

name: Zoro
text: After seeing you here living and talking, I'm not really surprised by anything you say...

name: Brook
text: Having my shadow stolen from me means that I am no longer able to exist in the world's light.

name: Brook
text: If I were to be hit with the light of the sun...

name: Brook
text: Someone with this same curse disappear when bathed in sunlight...

name: Brook
text: It was enough to make my hair stand on end!

name: Brook
text: A shadow is reflected on the ground by sunlight.

name: Brook
text: Therefore, I myself cannot be reflected in something like a mirror or photograph.

name: Brook
text: And here I exist, unable to be in light, with all my crewmates long dead!

name: Brook
text: But I lived through it all!

name: Brook
text: It's a pleasure to meet you!

name: Brook
text: Today is such a marvelous day!

name: Brook
text: For so many years I've sailed through this ocean,

name: Brook
text: The fog making it so dark I couldn't even tell when the days passed...

name: Brook
text: I was all alone on a ship that couldn't steer...

name: Brook
text: Sailing aimlessly for many, many years...

name: Brook
text: All of you are my joy!

name: Brook
text: I'm so happy that I would cry if I were able!

name: Brook
text: You asked me to join your crew, correct?

name: Brook
text: That made me very happy, thank you very much.

name: Brook
text: However, I must refuse your offer.

name: Brook
text: As I told you before, my shadow was stolen, and I am unable to return to the light of the world.

name: Brook
text: Right now I'm being protected by the fog of this devils' sea.

name: Brook
text: If I were to leave this ocean with you, it would only be a matter of time before my body disappeared. {should this and the previous line be merged?}

name: Brook
text: I'll stay here, waiting for the joyous day when I can regain my shadow!

name: Luffy
text: What are you going on about?!

name: Luffy
text: If you need your shadow, I'll get it back for you.

name: Luffy
text: You said someone stole it, right?

name: Brook
text: You are a very kind person.

name: Brook
text: I can't tell you, who I've just met, to go and die for me.

name: Franky
text: Is the enemy really that strong?

name: Franky
text: That's fine, but can't you at least tell us his name?

name: Brook
text: You may find him if I do!

name: Brook
text: I don't know if I will find him before my second life is over.

name: Brook
text: If I do find him, I've decided I will fight him, but...

name: Brook
text: I was the musician on my crew.

name: Luffy
text: Then you've really gotta join our crew, idiot!

name: Brook
text: Let's sing a fun song together!

name: Brook
text: This is what caused that shaking!

name: Brook
text: This is the back of the gate...

name: Brook
text: Look at the back of the ship!

name: Brook
text: Did you, perhaps, pick up a floating barrel...?

name: Brook
text: This ship has been targeted since then.

name: Luffy
text: We've been right here the whole time...

name: Luffy
text: Why is there an island there?

name: Brook
text: That is the wandering ghost island...

name: Nami
text: The log pose isn't reacting at all!

name: Brook
text: It is because this island traveled here from the distant West Blue.

name: Brook
text: Oh, but today is such a lucky day.

name: Brook
text: Not only did I see people once more, but my deepest wish has come true as well!

name: Brook
text: Since I'm "just dead bones", I have to be light!

name: Brook
text: Now please, find a way to go through that gate behind you and leave this place.

name: Brook
text: I was so happy to meet you.

name: Brook
text: I will never forget your delicious food!

name: Brook
text: If fate will have it, let us meet again!

name: Zoro
text: Didn't he eat a devil fruit?!

name: Nami
text: We don't know what's going on here, but we do know that it's dangerous!
